sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 린데 2025년 연간 매출 340억 달러, 조정 EPS 16.46달러로 6% 성장

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 매출이 340억 달러로 3% 늘었고, 조정 주당순이익은 16.46달러로 6% 증가했다.
연간 영업활동 현금흐름이 104억 달러로 10% 늘었고, 주주에게 74억 달러를 환원했다.
4분기 조정 주당순이익은 4.20달러로 6% 늘었으나, GAAP 순이익은 린데AG 인수회계·구조조정 영향으로 15억 3,000만 달러(주당 3.26달러)로 줄었다.

riskChanges.text: 4분기 GAAP 순이익은 린데AG 인수회계·구조조정 비용 영향으로 전년 대비 11% 감소했다.

businessChanges.text: 총 프로젝트 수주잔고가 100억 달러에 달하며 영업이익·현금흐름·수주잔고가 각각 100억 달러를 넘어섰다.

financialHighlights.text: 연간 매출 340억 달러, 영업이익 89억 달러, 조정 영업이익 101억 달러를 기록했다.
연간 GAAP 주당순이익 14.61달러, 조정 주당순이익 16.46달러를 기록했다.
연간 영업활동 현금흐름 104억 달러를 창출했고 설비투자로 53억 달러를 집행했다.

watchItems.text: 회사가 제시한 2026년 조정 EPS 가이던스(최대 17.90달러, 6~9% 성장) 달성 여부를 지켜볼 필요가 있다.
까다로운 산업 환경에서 가격·생산성 개선이 마진을 지지할지 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 lin_ex991.htm PRESS RELEASE lin_ex991.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Linde Reports Full-Year and Fourth-Quarter 2025 Results Full-Year Highlights ➢ Sales $34.0 billion, up 3% YoY, underlying sales up 2% ➢ Operating profit $8.9 billion, adjusted operating profit $10.1 billion, up 4% ➢ Operating profit margin 26.3%; adjusted operating profit margin 29.8% ➢ EPS $14.61; adjusted EPS $16.46, up 6% YoY ➢ Operating cash flow of $10.4 billion, up 10% YoY ➢ Total project backlog of $10.0 billion ➢ Returned $7.4 billion to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases Fourth-Quarter Highlights ➢ Sales $8.8 billion, up 6% YoY, underlying sales up 3%   Normalized numeric aliases: $34.0 billion = 340억 달러; $8.9 billion = 89억 달러; $10.1 billion = 101억 달러; $10.4 billion = 104억 달러; $10.0 billion = 100억 달러; $7.4 billion = 74억 달러; $8.8 billion = 88억 달러; $2.0 billion = 20억 달러; $3.0 billion = 30억 달러; $16.46 = 16.46달러; $2.0 = 2.0달러; $8.8 = 8.8달러; $2.6 = 2.6달러; $3.26 = 3.26달러; $4.20 = 4.20달러; $3.0 = 3.0달러.

idance ➢ First-quarter 2026 adjusted EPS guidance $4.20 - $4.30, represents 6%-9% growth or 3%-6% ex FX ➢ Full-year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance $17.40 - $17.90, represents 6%-9% growth or 5%-8% ex FX Woking, UK, February 5, 2026 – Linde plc (Nasdaq: LIN) today reported fourth-quarter 2025 net income of $1,530 million and diluted earnings per share of $3.26, down 11% and 9%, respectively. Excluding Linde AG purchase accounting impacts and restructuring charge impacts, adjusted net income was $1,968 million, up 4% versus prior year. Adjusted earnings per share was $4.20, 6% above prior year. Linde’s sales f  Normalized numeric aliases: $1,530 million = 15억 3,000만 달러; $1,968 million = 19억 6,800만 달러; $8,764 million = 87억 6,400만 달러; $4.20 = 4.20달러; $4.30 = 4.30달러; $17.40 = 17.40달러; $17.90 = 17.90달러; $1,530 = 1,530달러; $1,968 = 1,968달러; 8,764 million = 87억 6,400만 달러; $8,764 = 8,764달러; $2,018 = 2,018달러; 1,530 million = 15억 3,000만 달러; 1,968 million = 19억 6,800만 달러; 2,018 million = 20억 1,800만 달러.

illion. Adjusted operating profit of $2,585 million was up 4% versus prior year led by higher price and continued productivity initiatives across all segments. Adjusted operating profit margin of 29.5% was 40 basis points below prior year. Fourth-quarter operating cash flow of $3,030 million increased 8% versus prior year. After capital expenditures of $1,458 million, free cash flow was $1,572 million. During the quarter, the company returned $2,085 million to shareholders through dividends and stock repurchases, net of   Normalized numeric aliases: $2,585 million = 25억 8,500만 달러; $3,030 million = 30억 3,000만 달러; $1,458 million = 14억 5,800만 달러; $1,572 million = 15억 7,200만 달러; $2,085 million = 20억 8,500만 달러; $34.0 billion = 340억 달러; $8.9 billion = 89억 달러; $10.1 billion = 101억 달러; $3,030 = 3,030달러; $8.9 = 8.9달러; 1,572 million = 15억 7,200만 달러; 2,585 million = 25억 8,500만 달러; 3,030 million = 30억 3,000만 달러; 1,458 million = 14억 5,800만 달러; 2,085 million = 20억 8,500만 달러; 40 basis points = 40포인트.

ts higher than 2024. Diluted earnings per share was $14.61 and adjusted diluted earnings per share was $16.46, up 6% versus prior year. In 2025, Linde generated strong operating cash flow of $10.4 billion. The company invested $5.3 billion in capital expenditures and returned $7.4 billion to shareholders in the form of dividends and share buybacks, net of issuances. Page 1/10 Commenting on the financial results and business outlook, Chief Executive Officer Sanjiv Lamba said, “Linde delivered another year of resilient performance, with operating profit, cash flow and backlog each exceeding $10 billion. Operating margins expanded to 29.8%, ROC reached 24.2% and EPS grew 6%. These results underscore the strength of our operating model and the exceptional execution by the Linde   Normalized numeric aliases: $10.4 billion = 104억 달러; $5.3 billion = 53억 달러; $7.4 billion = 74억 달러; $10 billion = 100억 달러; $14.61 = 14.61달러; $16.46 = 16.46달러; $10.4 = 10.4달러; $5.3 = 5.3달러; $10 = 10달러; $7.4 = 7.4달러.
